hero.title: Premium Dental Care & Aesthetics at Soufia Clinic
hero.description: The latest and most efficient dental and cosmetic treatments. Regrow your beautiful, healthy smile naturally and confidently with Istanbul's leading dental medical experts.

overview.title: Dental & Smile Restoration
overview.text: Get your dream smile in Istanbul with Soufia Clinic. Nothing gives us greater pleasure than seeing someone leave our clinic with a healthy, dazzling smile and fully renewed confidence. We offer state-of-the-art procedures under the highest hygienic standards.

coreFeatures.title: Same Day Dentistry
coreFeatures.description: Procedures such as a root canal & crown, extraction & implant, and bone graft/sinus lift normally take 3-5 visits. We can do it in one!

coreFeatures.title: Specialist Consultation
coreFeatures.description: We take pride in explaining to our patients the status of their dental health. We guide you in developing an effective treatment plan.

coreFeatures.title: Online Appointment
coreFeatures.description: Fill out the form, tell us your convenient time for an appointment and we will call you for confirmation.

about.title: World-Class Dental Care Services at Soufia Clinic
paragraphs: Soufia Clinic offers a high-quality, uniquely personalized dental care experience in Istanbul, Turkey. We work with carefully selected, highly accredited dental surgeons and orthodontists to ensure exceptional cosmetic and reconstructive results.

Patients from diverse backgrounds travel from around the world to receive our specialized treatments. Our absolute commitment is to provide a world-class clinical experience, delivering perfectly natural, long-lasting, and healthy smiles that change lives.
Equipped with the latest CAD/CAM dental design systems, laser whitening modules, and sapphire implant technologies, we combine medical authority with absolute patient comfort.
about.watchVideoSub: Take a 1-min virtual tour of our luxury clinic
about.videoSub: Take a digital walk through our state-of-the-art facilities in Istanbul, Turkey.
about.description: Founded by leading dental surgeons, Soufia Clinic has been transforming smiles across Istanbul for over 15 years.

treatments.title: Explore Our Dental Care Treatments
treatments.subtitle: Five advanced, JCI-accredited treatments — every procedure backed by a lifetime warranty and a dedicated aftercare program.

items.title: Dental Crowns
items.cardDescription: A tooth-shaped cap that fully restores a damaged tooth's shape, strength, and appearance.
items.intro: A dental crown is a tooth-shaped cap that completely covers a damaged tooth above the gum line, rebuilding its shape, size, strength, and appearance. Made from biocompatible ceramics such as E-Max and Zirconia, our crowns function and look exactly like natural teeth.

sections.heading: When You Might Need a Crown
items: After root canal therapy, when the tooth becomes fragile
Large fillings covering 50%+ of the tooth
Severe cracks or fractures
Teeth worn down from grinding
To complete an implant restoration

sections.heading: Choosing the Right Material
items: E-Max (front teeth): the most translucent option, mimics natural enamel, stain-resistant, 400 MPa strength, 15-20 year warranty — ideal for the visible smile zone
Zirconia (back teeth): extremely durable with 1200+ MPa bite-force resistance, chip-resistant, minimal tooth reduction, 20-25 year warranty — ideal for molars and heavy grinders

sections.heading: Treatment Process
items: First appointment: under local anaesthesia the damaged tooth is reshaped, a digital impression is taken, and a temporary crown is fitted
Second appointment (5-7 days later): the permanent crown is fitted, adjusted for bite and colour, then permanently cemented

sections.heading: Caring for Your Crown
items: Maintain daily oral hygiene
Wear a nightguard if you grind your teeth
Avoid biting extremely hard foods
Keep up regular dental check-ups

items.title: Dental Implants
items.cardDescription: Titanium posts that replace missing teeth permanently, restoring a natural bite and smile.
items.intro: Dental implants are the gold standard for replacing missing teeth. A titanium post is surgically placed into the jawbone, where it fuses naturally to create a permanent, stable foundation for a custom porcelain crown. We use premium Swiss and Swedish implant systems with 98%+ success rates.

sections.heading: Why Implants Outperform Dentures
items: Prevent jawbone deterioration through natural stimulation
A permanent solution designed to last a lifetime
Restore 90%+ of natural bite force for normal eating
Stay fixed in place without slipping
Achieve aesthetics that match your natural teeth

sections.heading: Treatment Options
items: Single Tooth Implant: 3-6 months to complete, the most economical long-term choice with a 98% success rate
All-on-4 / All-on-6: replaces a full arch of teeth using just 4-6 implants, with temporary teeth fitted the same day

sections.heading: The Three-Stage Procedure
items: Day 1 — Surgical placement: the titanium implant is inserted under local anaesthesia and a temporary tooth is fitted immediately
3-6 months — Osseointegration: the bone naturally fuses with the implant (4-6 months upper jaw, 3-4 months lower jaw)
Final stage — Crown placement: a custom porcelain crown is attached once the implant has fully integrated

sections.heading: Are You a Candidate?
items: Adequate jawbone volume (bone grafting available if needed)
Healthy gums, free of active disease
Non-smoker or willing to quit during healing
Generally good general health (controlled diabetes is acceptable)

items.title: Dental Veneers
items.cardDescription: Wafer-thin custom ceramic shells that transform the shape, colour, and alignment of your smile.
items.intro: Porcelain veneers are wafer-thin ceramic shells, just 0.3-0.5mm, custom-made to cover the front surface of your teeth. They offer a more conservative approach to smile improvement than crowns, preserving more of your natural tooth structure.

sections.heading: What Veneers Can Correct
items: Discolouration: permanent stains from tetracycline, fluorosis, or root canal treatment
Chips & wear: repairing worn edges and rebuilding tooth length
Gaps & spacing: closing small gaps without orthodontics
Minor misalignment: making slightly crooked teeth appear straight

sections.heading: Treatment Process
items: Visit 1: minimal enamel preparation, digital impressions, and temporary veneer placement
Visit 2 (5-7 days later): permanent bonding with tooth-coloured adhesive and final adjustments

sections.heading: How Long Do Veneers Last?
items: 95% of veneers are still in place after 10 years
85% are still in place after 15 years
Daily hygiene, avoiding hard objects, and regular check-ups extend their life further

items.title: Hollywood Smile
items.cardDescription: A full smile makeover combining art and science for perfectly aligned, brilliantly white teeth.
items.intro: The Hollywood Smile is a complete smile makeover that combines art and science to create perfectly aligned, brilliantly white teeth that still look completely natural. Following the Golden Ratio and a brilliant white shade, it delivers an instant orthodontic effect without braces.

sections.heading: What Makes It a 'Hollywood' Smile
items: Perfect symmetry following Golden Ratio principles
A brilliant white shade selection (typically A1 or B1)
Natural translucency that mimics real enamel
An instant orthodontic effect without braces

sections.heading: The 7-Day Journey
items: Day 1: Digital Smile Design consultation with 3D imaging, facial analysis, and shade selection
Days 2-3: precision tooth preparation with minimal removal, temporary veneers fitted immediately
Days 4-6: your custom veneers are hand-crafted by a master ceramist using E-Max Lithium Disilicate
Day 7: final bonding and smile reveal

sections.heading: Material Options
items: E-Max (recommended): the most natural translucency, 400 MPa strength, 15-20 year warranty
Zirconia (maximum strength): virtually indestructible, 20-25 year warranty

sections.heading: What's Included
items: 16-20 premium veneers
Digital Smile Design
Temporary veneers
Professional teeth cleaning
Custom shade matching
Aftercare kit

items.title: Teeth Whitening
items.cardDescription: Dentist-supervised whitening that lifts teeth 6-10 shades brighter in a single 60-90 minute session.
items.intro: Our professional in-office whitening uses pharmaceutical-grade bleaching agents (35-40% hydrogen peroxide) to lighten teeth by 6-10 shades in just 60-90 minutes — far beyond what over-the-counter kits can achieve, and fully dentist-supervised for comfort and safety.

sections.heading: Professional vs. Home Kits
items: Professional: 35-40% concentration, results in 60-90 minutes, 6-10 shades lighter, dentist supervision and gum protection included
Home kits: 3-10% concentration, 2-4 weeks of daily application, only 2-4 shades lighter, with a higher risk of gum irritation and uneven results

sections.heading: The Whitening Process
items: Step 1 — Preparation: a professional cleaning removes plaque, your shade is measured, and gums are protected
Step 2 — Gel application: professional-strength gel is activated with a blue LED light in 15-20 minute cycles
Step 3 — Multiple cycles: the gel is reapplied 3-4 times to progressively lift deeper stains

sections.heading: Expected Results by Stain Type
items: Coffee/tea stains: 8-10 shades lighter
Yellow/age-related stains: 6-8 shades lighter
Smoking stains: 5-7 shades lighter

sections.heading: Aftercare — Critical First 48 Hours
items: Avoid all staining foods and drinks: coffee, tea, red wine, berries, tomato sauce
Teeth pores remain open during this period and readily absorb stains

services.title: Everything Included in Your Journey
services.subtitle: We take care of every detail so you can focus on your smile.

items.title: Luxury Hotel Stay
items.description: During your medical and dental journey, Soufia Clinic provides its international patients with complimentary accommodation in pre-selected 5-star hotels in Istanbul.

items.title: Multilanguage Support
items.description: We assign a personal host and professional interpreter who speaks your language fluently to assist you through every medical consultation and step of your stay.

items.title: Dedicated Aftercare
items.description: Soufia Clinic follows and monitors its patients for a full year after their dental treatment or implants, with regular remote check-ups to guarantee lasting results.

items.title: Free Consultation
items.description: Soufia Clinic does not charge for the initial virtual consultation or detailed clinical treatment planning, offering transparent digital smiles diagnostics.

items.title: Patient's Well-Being
items.description: We treat each patient like a member of our family. Our priority is making your dental experience pain-free, comfortable, stress-free, and satisfying.

items.title: Free VIP Transfers
items.description: Soufia Clinic provides private, luxury VIP transfers for our patients throughout their stay, covering airport pickups, hotel, and the clinical facility.

beforeAfter.title: Before & After Results
beforeAfter.description: Real smile transformations achieved by our dental team on actual patients.

specialty.title: Our Dental Specialties
specialty.description: The clinic provides modern medical solutions including advanced cosmetic dentistry, orthodontic alignment, bone grafting, and immediate-load sapphire implants.
specialty.longDescription: The hospital provides comprehensive, state-of-the-art services delivered by experienced clinical teams. We focus on your personal facial aesthetics and use proven materials and technology to achieve transformative smile makeovers. Our premium care packages include deluxe hotel accommodation, VIP private transfers, and a full year of customized aftercare – all designed to make your medical journey safe, painless, comfortable, and successful.

team.title: The Dental Experts Behind Your Smile
team.subtitle: A dedicated team of registered dentists committed to your comfort, safety, and results.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from real patients who transformed their smiles at Soufia Clinic.

items.name: Sofia Martins
items.text: Warm, patient-focused service and absolute precision. I had full arch zirconium crowns done, and I feel so much more confident showing off my smile. Excellent aftercare!

items.name: Ahmed R.
items.text: Choosing Soufia Clinic was the best decision! From the free online consultation to the VIP airport pickup, everything was top notch. The Sapphire dental implants look extremely natural and feel exactly like real teeth.

items.name: Marco L.
items.text: Professional and painless from start to finish. Free hotel accommodation, seamless private transfers, and a highly skilled medical team made my smile makeover stress-free. Highly recommended!
